title: Luxury Building Pack
description: Designed for luxury structures and high-value themed builds.
body:
![Luxury Building Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af76e52aa3c9328c94b4028f3da19284875f9707_0.webp) 

Luxury Building Pack adds a set of high-quality decorative blocks made from gold, diamond, and iron. The mod focuses on aesthetics and expands building possibilities while staying close to the vanilla style.

The blocks are designed for luxury builds such as vaults, castles, palaces, and rich interiors, providing more variety without breaking the visual consistency of Minecraft.

All blocks are crafted using vanilla materials, including gold, diamond, and iron.

Goal of the mod

The goal is to provide elegant and premium building options using valuable materials while preserving the original gameplay balance.
